subTitle: Jethalal is in for a surprise when Shetty visits his electronic store and is impressed with his salesmanship. Soon, Jethalal is thrilled as Shetty places a huge order with him.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Babu Chipke is annoyed when Jethalal keeps criticising his every move. Soon, he decides not to do any of society's work, much to the other residents' dismay.

subTitle: Sodhi informs Taarak that his friend, Happy, is organising a new year party in Gokuldham Society. Meanwhile, Bhide begins to sweat about the upcoming party.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: With the men and children off to their parties, the women of Gokuldham Society decide to celebrate New Year with each other.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The residents look back on some of their favourite memories from the previous year. Soon, they excitedly wait for midnight to usher in the new year.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal is pleased when he starts off the new year by seeing Babita. However, his pleasant mood is ruined when Bhide stops by and asks him to pay his maintainence bill.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: A big crowd forms outside Jethalal's store when they begin selling a brand new trype of phone. Soon, Tappu asks Jethalal to reserve one model for him.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal's new year gets off to the best possible start as he bumps into Babita early in the morning. Later, things take a turn for the better as he has a day of record-breaking sale at his store.

title: Maddam Sir
subTitle: When she drops Savitri back to her residence, Pushpa realises that the woman is mistreated by her son and daughter-in-law. Soon, Pushpa begins to fear the worst for Savitri.

title: Maddam Sir
subTitle: Haseena and Pushpa disguise themselves as Savitri's relatives and stay with her in order to get to the bottom of her case.

title: Maddam Sir
subTitle: After Karishma accidentally shoots Ajay, the family rushes him to the hospital and learns that he needs an expensive surgery immediately. Later, Savitri comes up with an idea to gather the funds.

title: Maddam Sir
subTitle: After Karishma takes over as the head of the police station, she is tasked with solving a robbery case that involves two women who are extremely social media-savvy.

title: Maddam Sir
subTitle: After Karishma and Pushpa fail to bring a notorious thief to justice, the case is moved to the cyber cell, leaving the duo embarrassed.
